summary: Completed testing of P0 bug fixes for ALL_MODES sessions in Play to Learn. All 5 features verified as WORKING: (1) Fill in the Blank answer validation in ALL_MODES sessions correctly uses blank_answer field, (2) Teacher Host View shows selected_mode for each participant with color-coded badges, (3) ALL_MODES session flow works correctly (join -> select mode -> play), (4) True/False game mode validation works, (5) Quiz game mode validation works.
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Bug Fix #1 VERIFIED: submit-answer endpoint (line 973-1083) correctly uses participant's selected_mode and game_payload when session is 'all_modes'
P0 Bug Fix #2 VERIFIED: select-mode endpoint (line 851-896) stores selected_mode in participant record
Fill in the Blank validation (lines 1021-1026) correctly checks against blank_answer field from game_payload
Host View polling (lines 57-98 in PlayToLearnHost.js) correctly updates player modes every 3 seconds
Mode badges display correctly with color-coded gradients (lines 503-545 in PlayToLearnHost.js)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All features verified working via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Used existing ALL_MODES session ps_4e12196eafae47cb with participants: Pedro (fill_blank), Maria (quiz), and others
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fixes for ALL_MODES sessions fully tested and working. Key fixes: (1) Fill in the Blank answers in ALL_MODES sessions are now validated against blank_answer field instead of MCQ options, (2) Teacher Host View shows selected_mode badges for each participant. Test session ps_4e12196eafae47cb (PIN: 416057) has multiple participants with different modes selected.

p0_fill_blank_validation.description: Fill in the Blank answer validation in ALL_MODES sessions uses blank_answer field
p0_fill_blank_validation.evidence: Backend test test_fill_blank_answer_validation_in_all_modes passed - answer 'product' correctly marked as CORRECT

p0_host_view_selected_mode.description: Teacher Host View shows selected_mode for each participant
p0_host_view_selected_mode.evidence: Screenshot shows Pedro with 'Fill' badge, Maria with 'Quiz' badge, FlowTest with 'T/F' badge

all_modes_session_flow.description: ALL_MODES session flow: join -> select mode -> play with correct game payload
all_modes_session_flow.evidence: Backend test test_join_select_mode_play_flow passed, Frontend shows mode selection then game

true_false_validation.description: True/False game mode validation works correctly

quiz_validation.description: Quiz game mode validation works correctly

fill_blank_ui.description: Fill in the Blank UI shows sentence with _____ placeholder and hint
fill_blank_ui.evidence: Screenshot shows 'A _____ is the result...' with 'Hint: Starts with P, 7 letters'

mode_selection_ui.description: Mode selection screen shows available game modes
mode_selection_ui.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Choose How to Play!' with Classic Quiz, True/False, Fill in Blank options
